items.title: Leicester's 'horrible' journey ends with relegation
items.summary: Leicester City have been relegated to League One from the Championship after a 2-2 draw with Hull City on Tuesday night.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Rams expect WR Puka Nacua to fully participate in offseason program
items.summary: Rams wide receiver Puka Nacua showed up for the start of the team's voluntary offseason program on Monday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: The IOC’s decision to protect the female category is a victory for fairness | Tanya Aldred
